prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(create-provisional-booking hotel_segment_1)
(allocate-offer-to-booking hotel_segment_1 service_offer_1)
(assign-traveler-profile-to-booking hotel_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(confirm-booking-request hotel_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(assign-agent-to-booking hotel_segment_1 agent_1)
(allocate-room-option-to-hotel-segment hotel_segment_1 room_option_1 traveler_profile_1)
(confirm-hotel-segment-readiness-by-agent hotel_segment_1 room_option_1 agent_1)
(unassign-agent-from-booking hotel_segment_1 agent_1)
(release-traveler-profile-from-booking hotel_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(create-provisional-booking transport_segment_1)
(allocate-offer-to-booking transport_segment_1 service_offer_2)
(assign-traveler-profile-to-booking transport_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(confirm-booking-request transport_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(assign-agent-to-booking transport_segment_1 agent_1)
(allocate-seat-option-to-transport-segment transport_segment_1 seat_option_1 traveler_profile_1)
(confirm-transport-segment-readiness-by-agent transport_segment_1 seat_option_1 agent_1)
(issue-confirmation-document hotel_segment_1 transport_segment_1 room_option_1 seat_option_1 confirmation_document_template_1)
(release-traveler-profile-from-booking transport_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(assign-traveler-profile-to-booking hotel_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(finalize-confirmation-document-for-hotel-segment confirmation_document_template_1 hotel_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(fulfill-hotel-segment hotel_segment_1 confirmation_document_template_1)
(fulfill-transport-segment transport_segment_1 confirmation_document_template_1)
(apply-checkin-token-to-booking hotel_segment_1 check_in_token_1 traveler_profile_1)
(synchronize-checkin-and-commit-hotel-segment hotel_segment_1 service_offer_1 check_in_token_1)
(release-traveler-profile-from-booking hotel_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(assign-traveler-profile-to-booking transport_segment_1 traveler_profile_1)
(apply-checkin-token-to-booking transport_segment_1 check_in_token_1 traveler_profile_1)
(synchronize-checkin-and-commit-transport-segment transport_segment_1 service_offer_2 check_in_token_1)
(unassign-agent-from-booking transport_segment_1 agent_1)
(create-provisional-booking consolidated_itinerary_1)
(allocate-offer-to-booking consolidated_itinerary_1 service_offer_3)
(assign-traveler-profile-to-booking consolidated_itinerary_1 traveler_profile_1)
(confirm-booking-request consolidated_itinerary_1 traveler_profile_1)
(assign-room-preference-to-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_1 room_preference_1)
(assign-access-credential-to-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_1 access_credential_1)
(assign-agent-to-booking consolidated_itinerary_1 agent_1)
(attach-bundle-to-itinerary-document consolidated_itinerary_1 attachment_bundle_1 confirmation_document_template_1)
(prepare-itinerary-for-attachments consolidated_itinerary_1 attachment_bundle_1 confirmation_document_template_1 traveler_profile_1)
(apply-room-preference-to-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_1 room_preference_1 agent_1 attachment_bundle_1 confirmation_document_template_1)
(attach-access-credential-to-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_1 access_credential_1 attachment_bundle_1 confirmation_document_template_1)
(validate-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_1)
(apply-checkin-token-to-booking consolidated_itinerary_1 check_in_token_1 traveler_profile_1)
(synchronize-checkin-and-commit-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_1 service_offer_3 check_in_token_1)
(release-traveler-profile-from-booking consolidated_itinerary_1 traveler_profile_1)
(unassign-agent-from-booking consolidated_itinerary_1 agent_1)
(remove-room-preference-from-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_1 room_preference_1)
(remove-access-credential-from-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_1 access_credential_1)
(create-provisional-booking consolidated_itinerary_2)
(allocate-offer-to-booking consolidated_itinerary_2 service_offer_1)
(assign-traveler-profile-to-booking consolidated_itinerary_2 traveler_profile_1)
(confirm-booking-request consolidated_itinerary_2 traveler_profile_1)
(assign-room-preference-to-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_2 room_preference_1)
(assign-access-credential-to-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_2 access_credential_1)
(assign-agent-to-booking consolidated_itinerary_2 agent_1)
(attach-bundle-to-itinerary-document consolidated_itinerary_2 attachment_bundle_2 confirmation_document_template_1)
(prepare-itinerary-for-attachments consolidated_itinerary_2 attachment_bundle_2 confirmation_document_template_1 traveler_profile_1)
(apply-room-preference-to-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_2 room_preference_1 agent_1 attachment_bundle_2 confirmation_document_template_1)
(attach-access-credential-to-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_2 access_credential_1 attachment_bundle_2 confirmation_document_template_1)
(validate-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_2)
(apply-checkin-token-to-booking consolidated_itinerary_2 check_in_token_1 traveler_profile_1)
(synchronize-checkin-and-commit-itinerary consolidated_itinerary_2 service_offer_1 check_in_token_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is complex, involving a tourism booking system with hotel and transport segments, itineraries, and many steps for booking, confirming, allocating resources, etc. The goal is to finalize reservations for hotel_segment_1, transport_segment_1, consolidated_itinerary_1, and consolidated_itinerary_2.


## Examining System Complexity  
- The tourism booking system handles hotel and transport segments, requiring coordination for booking and confirmation.  
- Itineraries like consolidated_itinerary_1 and consolidated_itinerary_2 involve multiple steps, including resource allocation.  
- The goal is to finalize reservations for specific segments, ensuring all parts align seamlessly.

## Examining System Complexity  
- The system starts with no bookings confirmed or processing, requiring creation of provisional bookings first.  
- Booking requests include hotel_segment_1, transport_segment_1, and both consolidated_itineraries, each needing separate finalization.  
- Finalization involves multiple steps like allocating offers, confirming bookings, and ensuring check-in readiness.  

## Assessing Booking Dependencies  
- Segments and itineraries follow different paths to finalization, with segments needing fulfill actions and itineraries having unique steps.  
- Finalizing requires check-in registration, hold offers, and check-in tokens, achieved via synchronize_checkin_and_commit actions.  
- Add-ons, rate plans, and loyalty programs may affect the process, but the goal focuses solely on finalization.  

## Investigating Loyalty Program Availability  
- Consolidated_itinerary_1 uses loyalty_program_1, which is available, while consolidated_itinerary_2 references loyalty_program_2, unavailable per initial state.  
- This discrepancy may impact ci2’s finalization, but isn’t required for achieving the goal of finalizing all bookings.

## Analyzing Resource Constraints  
- Both consolidated_itinerary_1 and consolidated_itinerary_2 share confirmation_document_template_1, but issuing it makes it unavailable, limiting use to once.  
- Traveler_profile_1 is available only once, requiring sequential assignment, processing, and release for bookings to proceed.  

## Exploring Processing Dependencies  
- Hotel_segment_1 and transport_segment_1 need individual processing, including room and seat allocation, before itinerary finalization.  
- Issuing confirmation documents ties to segments, not itineraries, complicating shared resource use across bookings.  

## Assessing Sequential Processing  
- Segments and itineraries require separate confirmed reservations, suggesting independent flows with shared resource management.  
- Offers and profiles can be released after finalization, enabling sequential processing to manage shortages effectively.

## Outlining Segment Processing  
- Hotel_segment_1 and transport_segment_1 require separate processing, starting with creating provisional bookings and allocating offers.  
- Each segment needs traveler_profile_1 assigned, confirmed, and then processed for room or seat options, like allocating room_option_1 to hotel_segment_1.  

## Managing Resource Allocation  
- Traveler_profile_1, agent_1, and options like room_option_1 are single-use, requiring careful sequencing to avoid conflicts.  
- After allocating resources to one segment, traveler_profile_1 must be released to assign it to another, ensuring sequential processing.  

## Sequencing Booking Steps  
- For hotel_segment_1, the process involves confirming the booking, assigning agent_1, and allocating room_option_1, keeping traveler_profile_1 assigned.  
- To process transport_segment_1, traveler_profile_1 must be released from hotel_segment_1 first, then reassigned for seat allocation, highlighting dependency on release actions.

## Finalizing Segment Bookings  
- Hotel_segment_1 is finalized after allocating room_option_1, with so1 and check_in_token_1 released and available.  
- Transport_segment_1 follows, requiring traveler_profile_1 reassigned after release from hotel_segment_1, then finalized with seat_option_2 and token availability restored.  

## Managing Itinerary Processing  
- Itineraries like consolidated_itinerary_1 need provisional booking creation, offer allocation (e.g., so3), and traveler_profile_1 assignment before confirmation.  
- Additional steps include assigning room preferences, access credentials, and rate plans, with availability checks for resources like room_preference_1 and rate_plan_1.  

## Preparing Itinerary Attachments  
- Attaching attachment bundles to itinerary documents requires confirmed status, issued and finalized confirmation documents, and available bundles like ab1.  
- Preparation for attachments involves ensuring no room add-on flags and traveler_profile_1 assignment, setting the itinerary as prepared after bundling.

## Continuing Itinerary Preparation  
- Attaching attachment bundle ab1 to consolidated_itinerary_1's confirmation document cd1 is possible since ab1 is available and ci1 is confirmed.  
- Preparing consolidated_itinerary_1 for attachments requires traveler_profile_1 assigned, no room add-on flags, and ab1 attached, setting ci1 as prepared.  

## Applying Preferences and Credentials  
- Applying room_preference_1 to consolidated_itinerary_1 needs ci1 prepared, agent_1 assigned, and ab1 bundled, marking preferences applied.  
- Attaching access_credential_1 to ci1 follows, requiring preferences applied and no additional flags, readying ci1 for validation.  

## Finalizing Itinerary Process  
- Validating consolidated_itinerary_1 requires it ready for validation with no additional flags, finalizing the itinerary and setting it ready for finalization.  
- Applying check_in_token_1 and synchronizing with service_offer_3 finalizes the reservation, with traveler_profile_1 and agent_1 still assigned, and tokens available.  

## Handling Multiple Itineraries  
- For consolidated_itinerary_2, room_preference_1 is unavailable after use in ci1, with no release action to make it available again.  
- Assigning a room preference is necessary for the same process path, but with only one rp1 and no alternative paths without it, ci2 processing is blocked.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
